A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s final computation (execute_python:30) identified ACM-published papers by naively checking if the full text contained the substring "ACM" or "acm.org" and then filtered 2018 citations by those titles, resulting in only two matches and an average of 68.50 rather than correctly extracting/normalizing the publisher and capturing all ACM papers.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
